command:
gh pr create --base main --head task/t0025_lit_survey_hierarchical_agents_and_judges_2024_2026 --title t0025 lit survey re-scoped: synthesize RQ1-RQ5 answers --body ## Summary

* Re-scoped from a 10-paper survey to a synthesis answering RQ1-RQ5 (all 10 source papers were already in the t0017 inventory).
* Synthesizes literature-derived verdicts and prior-project evidence (t0014, t0019, t0020) for each RQ; produces a recommended Phase 2 next-experiment design within the ~$23 remaining budget.
* Produces 6 follow-up suggestions (S-0025-01 .. S-0025-06) covering a high-priority calibration A/B, a high-priority judge replacement, AgentBoard progress-rate adoption, a half-scale three-arm A/B/C pilot, a process improvement, and a deferred group-level DPO experiment.

## Test plan

- [x] verify_task_file passes (1 expected TF-W005 warning for empty expected_assets)
- [x] verify_task_results passes (0 errors, 0 warnings)
- [x] verify_logs passes (0 errors, 3 expected non-blocking warnings)
- [ ] verify_pr_premerge passes
- [ ] PR merged into main and overview/ refreshed
